title: AdditiveFEADeckBuilder Object
description: The AdditiveFEADeckBuilder supplies methods to generate cards to be used for generating an FEA simulation result.

methods.name: append
methods.description: Append an input card to the deck.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new AdditiveFEADeckBuilder object.

methods.name: createBuildPlateXYExtensionCard
methods.description: Creates the *SBXY card. Arguments are per the Fusion view cube, i.e. left is -x, right is +x, front is -y, and back is +y.

methods.name: createBuildPlateZBoundsCard
methods.description: Creates the *DDM! card to define the build plate z position and thickness.

methods.name: createConvection
methods.description: Creates a new AdditiveFEAConvection object to define *CONV data.

methods.name: createConvectionCard
methods.description: Creates the *CONV card to define a convection boundary condition.

methods.name: createDiskCheckCard
methods.description: Creates the *IOBN card to enable or disable the disk check.

methods.name: createDoubleCard
methods.description: Creates a generic enumerated card with a single double argument. Cards that can be created as a double card include: - STLToleranceCard - InitialTemperatureCard - AmbientTemperatureCard - FinalTemperatureCard - EvaporationTemperatureCard - AutomaticTimingCard

methods.name: createGenericCard
methods.description: Creates a generic key value card.

methods.name: createGoldakCard
methods.description: Creates the *GOLD card. See the figure at the following link for an illustration of the axes: https://help.autodesk.com/view/NETF/2026/ENU/?guid=GUID-3634FFD9-1976-4556-BE46-ED5850410853

methods.name: createIntCard
methods.description: Creates a generic enumerated card with a single integer argument. Cards that can be created as an int card include: - AnalysisTypeCard - LayersPerElementCard - CoarseningGenerationsCard - AdaptivityCard - PowderTypeCard - FineLayerCountCard - OutputFileFrequencyCard

methods.name: createLaserPathGenerationCard
methods.description: Creates the *LSRP card.

methods.name: createMaterialCard
methods.description: Creates the *MATE card block.

methods.name: createMechanicalRelaxationCard
methods.description: Creates the *RELM card.

methods.name: createPropertyScalingCard
methods.description: Creates the *DDM1 card.

methods.name: createRelaxationCard
methods.description: Creates the *RELA card.

methods.name: createSolutionParametersCard
methods.description: Creates the *SOLU card.

methods.name: createSTLMap
methods.description: Creates a new AdditiveFEASTLMap object to define *STLM data.

methods.name: createSTLMapCard
methods.description: Creates the *STLM card to define the STL mapping.

methods.name: createStringArrayCard
methods.description: Creates a generic enumerated card with an array of string arguments. Cards that can be created as a string array card include: - STLsCard - PRMsCard

methods.name: createStringCard
methods.description: Creates a generic enumerated card with a single string argument. Card(s) that can be created as a string card include: - TitleCard

methods.name: createTransientCard
methods.description: Creates the *TRAN card.

methods.name: createVoidCard
methods.description: Creates a generic enumerated card with no arguments. Cards that can be created as a void card include: - BinaryOutputCard - EnsightOutputCard - NoOffCoreCard - OnCore1Card - PowderCard - AutomaticMeshingCard - PowderBedYSymmetryCard - NewPRMGenerationMethodCard - EndCard

methods.name: createWarpInputCard
methods.description: Creates the *INPU card.

properties.name: cards
properties.description: Gets the list of cards that makes up the deck.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of analysis for which the warp input is being created, e.g. Mechanical or Thermal.
